lines.target: We took* my cousin to see* a cricket match last month.
lines.base: Llevamos a mi primo a ver un partido de cricket el mes pasado.

lines.target: But he fell* asleep during the game. (N. 1)
lines.base: Pero se durmió durante el juego.

lines.target: He slept* peacefully for two hours until a ball hit* him on the head and woke* him up.
lines.base: Durmió apaciblemente durante dos horas hasta que una pelota le golpeó en la cabeza y le despertó.

lines.target: Hello, it's nice to see* you again. How are you?
lines.base: ¡Hola! Qué alegría (es agradable) verte de nuevo. ¿Cómo estás?

lines.target: Very well. I'm going to stay with you for a few days.
lines.base: Muy bien. Me voy a quedar contigo (por) unos días.

gap_candidates.target: We took* my cousin to see* a cricket match last month.
But he fell* asleep during the game. (1) (N. 1)
He slept* peacefully for two hours until a ball hit* him on the head and woke* him up. (2)
Hello, it's nice to see* you again. How are you?
Very well. I'm going to stay with you for a few days. (3)
